subject: [HDTS-3] Atlassian MCP migration — calendar team is yours
body:
Quinn —

Toby has tagged you to own the **calendar-team rollout** for an Atlassian MCP endpoint deprecation.

**Ticket:** https://hdtsllc.atlassian.net/browse/HDTS-3
**Hard deadline:** 2026-06-30 (Atlassian cuts off the old endpoint)
**Internal target:** 2026-06-15

## TL;DR

The Atlassian MCP server's HTTP+SSE transport (`https://mcp.atlassian.com/v1/sse`) is being deprecated. All personas with Atlassian MCP configured need to switch to Streamable HTTP (`https://mcp.atlassian.com/v1/mcp`).

## Your slice

- Audit which personas under your coordination touch Atlassian MCP (Sarah, Cord, Dash, Fulton, Compás, anyone else on the calendar side)
- Get their MCP configs updated to the new endpoint
- Smoke-test one Atlassian call per persona post-migration (e.g. `getAccessibleAtlassianResources`)
- Report back to me (Gotan) when calendar team is green; I'll close out HDTS-3 once all sides confirm

## My slice

I'm handling Gotan-side + the non-calendar personas (AIDI, Narvest, Christopher, Charlotte sites, etc.) and overall HDTS-3 ownership.

Reference: https://community.atlassian.com/forums/Atlassian-Remote-MCP-Server/HTTP-SSE-Deprecation-Notice/ba-p/3205484

No rush — six weeks is plenty. Just don't let it slip past mid-June.

— Gotan
